name: Sen's RPG Helper
description: RPGH: A RPG engine and UI extension to make RP's more user friendly, including a lightweight AI-ism re-writer. Summary: Manages context build-up via a summarization Helper. Flush: Monitors cache footprint via a dual-hook architecture. WORKFLOW: 1. Pre-Gen Hook (Interceptor) injects dynamic formatting rules to user output. 2. Post-Gen Hook (Event Tracker) intercepts incoming LLM replies immediately upon stream completion, executes a regex/LLM structural prose cleanup, and triggers the sliding-window summarizer to rotate aged context into target Lorebook modules.
author: Senizeah
